study_area: San Francisco Bay and Port of Oakland Approaches
disclaimer: Historical AIS first-pass screening evidence demo. Not real-time, not for navigation, not for enforcement, and not for operational decision-making.

predicted_to_observed_abs_delta_min.eligibility: primary observable and common coverage within predicted closest time +/- tolerance

workload_compression.key_message: The pipeline aggregates 1,114,862 cleaned AIS observations into 57 spatial review units containing 5,389 candidate episodes; actual analyst review time was not measured.

stages.interpretation: Behavioral candidates selected for review, not event labels.
Pair records generated from future CPA/TCPA screening.
Repeated time-bin records merged into pair-day audit episodes.
Episodes with synchronized future AIS separation within the screening threshold.
Spatial triage layer for human review; cells are not incident labels.
Small explanation set for audit and presentation.

ranking_evaluation.interpretation: dual evidence-target review prioritization; not operational accuracy

full_window.interpretation: dual-target review prioritization; not accident or near-miss accuracy

fused_only_cases.interpretation: fused-only review cell; not an operational event label

ablation.interpretation: High-density cells include berth/anchorage behavior and are not sufficient as safety evidence.
Finds behavior deviations but misses dense crossing/meeting evidence.
Captures close-quarters candidates but lacks behavioral context.
Combines anomaly evidence and future encounter-candidate evidence.

geometric_controls.interpretation: Future geometric support comparison for candidate screening; not prediction accuracy, an accident or near-miss label, or an enforcement/navigation conclusion.

matching.nearest_rule: minimum current-distance difference, then reference-time difference, DCPA, TCPA, state skew, relative speed, closing speed, and anchor id

cohort_selection.local_exposure_definition: complete opportunity-record count in the date/analysis cell; within-day tied-midrank tertile; missing cell ids fall back to a 0.005-degree cell
